meaning: n.(美洲产的)一种燕雀类捕虫鸣鸟
examples: I might have identified the bird as a yellow-throated vireo if I'd had more than a dorsal view, "explained Roger."
She's given an insect to one of her nestlings, but now this black-capped vireo mother has two more hungry mouths to feed.
The red-eyed vireo suffers some of the biggest losses, some 581,000 deaths annually, though that represents less than 1 percent of its population.
